title: Metabolomics in rheumatic diseases: desperately seeking biomarkers.
author: Guma M Tiziani S Firestein GS
content: S-EPMC4963238 PMC4963238 Metabolomics in rheumatic diseases: desperately seeking biomarkers. Metabolomics enables the profiling of large numbers of small molecules in cells, tissues and biological fluids. These molecules, which include amino acids, carbohydrates, lipids, nucleotides
